---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability
title: ""
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

**Problem / motivation**
What are you trying to do, and what makes it hard today?

**Proposed direction**
What you'd like to see. Rough is fine.

**Scope notes**
- Does it keep the runtime standard-library-only? (New runtime dependencies are
  discussed first.)
- Does it affect proof / audit determinism? (Generation must not read the wall clock.)

**Alternatives considered**
Other approaches you thought about.

See [ROADMAP.md](../../ROADMAP.md) for current directions and
[docs/ARCHITECTURE.md](../../docs/ARCHITECTURE.md) for extension points.
